status.description: Response status indicator. Always 'SUCCESS' for this schema.

person.description: Person data retrieved from MAGDA GeefPersoon (KSZ source, BasisPersoonsgegevens). Fields map directly to Oracle TCA columns. Optional fields (middleName, deathDate, address.boxNumber) are omitted when absent.

partyName.description: Computed by OIC as '{firstName} {lastName} ({partyNumber})' → Oracle hz_parties.PARTY_NAME and TCA_PARTIES.SOURCE_PARTY_NAME

register.description: Register code derived from MAGDA Persoon/Register/Code, translated to Oracle-ready values. Always present — defaults to Rijksregister when MAGDA does not return a Register element. The `code` field maps directly to Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES DFF `authentiekeBron`.

code.description: Oracle `authentiekeBron` DFF value derived from MAGDA Register/Code: MAGDA `RR` or `1` → `"01"` (Rijksregister); MAGDA `2` (bevolkingsregister) → `"01"`; MAGDA `BIS` → `"02"`; MAGDA `RAD` → `"02"`; Register absent → `"01"` (default).

firstName.description: First given name from MAGDA Naam/Voornamen/Voornaam[1] → Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES.PERSON_FIRST_NAME

middleName.description: Middle name(s) from MAGDA Naam/Voornamen/Voornaam[2..n] joined with space → Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES.PERSON_MIDDLE_NAME. Omitted when no second given name.

lastName.description: Last name from MAGDA Naam/Achternamen/Achternaam[], all values joined with space → Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES.PERSON_LAST_NAME

gender.description: Gender from MAGDA Geslacht/Code and Geslacht/Omschrijving. Always present. The `code` field maps to Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES.GENDER.

code.description: Gender code from MAGDA Geslacht/Code → Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES.GENDER. 0=onbepaald, 1=man, 2=vrouw

deathDate.description: Date of death from MAGDA Overlijden/Datum → Oracle HZ_PERSON_PROFILES.DATE_OF_DEATH. Omitted when person is alive.

address.description: Main residence address (Hoofdverblijfplaats) from MAGDA. Always present on a 200 response — if MAGDA has no Hoofdverblijfplaats, a 422 ADDRESS_NOT_FOUND is returned. Optional sub-field boxNumber is omitted when absent.

streetName.description: Street name from MAGDA Hoofdverblijfplaats/NietGestandaardiseerdeStraatnaam/String → Oracle hz_parties.ADDRESS1

houseNumber.description: House number from MAGDA Hoofdverblijfplaats/Huisnummer → Oracle hz_parties.ADDRESS2

boxNumber.description: Box/bus number from MAGDA Hoofdverblijfplaats/Busnummer → Oracle hz_parties.ADDRESS3. Omitted when absent.

postalCode.description: Postal code from MAGDA Hoofdverblijfplaats/Postcode → Oracle hz_parties.POSTAL_CODE

city.description: Municipality name from MAGDA Hoofdverblijfplaats/NietGestandaardiseerdeGemeentenaam/String → Oracle hz_parties.CITY

countryIsoCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code from MAGDA Hoofdverblijfplaats/ISOCodeLand → Oracle hz_parties.COUNTRY
